mapper.insert: INSERT INTO radio_sessions (id, user_id, mood, story) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{mood}, #{story})
mapper.select: SELECT id, mood, story, dj_ment, comfort_text, novel_excerpt, created_at FROM radio_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO radio_recommendations (session_id, song_id, order_num, reason) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{songId}, #{orderNum}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT rr.song_id, s.title, s.artist, rr.order_num, rr.reason FROM radio_recommendations rr JOIN songs s ON s.id = rr.song_id WHERE rr.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY rr.order_num
